nodes.name: 大不列顛島
nodes.summary: 大不列顛島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联19种鸟类，包括粉脚雁、赤颈鸭、针尾鸭等19种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 猛鴞
nodes.summary: 猛鴞（Northern hawk-owl，学名 Surnia ulula），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于西伯利亚、大不列顛島，常见栖息地包括沼泽。
nodes.shortSummary: 猛鴞（學名：Surnia ulula），又名北方鷹鴞或長尾鴞，是一種貓頭鷹。它們雖又稱「鷹鴞」，但並非屬於鷹鴞屬，而是猛鴞屬下的唯一物種。 特徵 猛鴞的體型中等大小，雙翼的形狀及長的尾巴像鷹，故又稱北方鷹鴞。它們長約35-43厘米，翼展69-82厘米。頭部很圓，眼睛黃色，上身呈…

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: 2008"/> The other two subspecies are found in northeastern Europe and Siberia: S

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: ulula can occasionally be found in more southern areas such as Great Britain, southern Russia and Scandinavia, following explosions of prey. Northern hawk-owls are unevenly distributed and highly variable throughout the boreal forest. They live mostly in open coniferous forests, or coniferous forests mixed with deciduous species such as larch, birch, poplar, and willow

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: They are found in muskegs, clearings, swamp valleys, meadows, or recently burnt areas, and generally avoid dense spruce-fir forests. Their winter habitat is usually the same as the breeding habitat
